comment: Project-level hook configuration for sharekit-profile. Wires observability and safety hooks to Claude Code lifecycle events. Loaded automatically by Claude Code when present in .claude/ directory. Unlike claude/settings.json (shipping artifact), this file is committed and applies to local development sessions.

PostToolUse.comment: Trajectory telemetry: observe all tool calls for the self-improvement flywheel. Logs outcome + input/response summary to .harness/runtime/trajectory.jsonl. Non-blocking; pure observation.

runtime_dir_note: Append-only trajectory, session records, compaction snapshots, incident stubs, and the distill pending queue. Gitignored — see .gitignore.
